name: Deadshot
short_description: You wake up as an army soldier in the middle of a mutant apocalypse, trying to figure out what the hell happened and blasting some heads on the way. Deadshot is a retro styled first person shooter inspired from classics like Half Life, Doom, Quake and many alike.
detailed_description:
You wake up as an army soldier in the middle of a mutant apocalypse, trying to figure out what the hell happened and blasting some heads on the way. Deadshot is a retro styled first person shooter inspired from classics like Half Life, Doom, Quake and many alike.

Something happened to the world overnight, everyone either became a mutant or is dead and it seems like you're the only one who can figure out what happened and put a stop to it. Go through tunnels, laboratories, buildings and storage areas, exploring for secrets, finding items to progress and killing mutants to survive.

Experience a 3 chapter campaign with 6 levels each, 7 different weapons, 5 weapon attachments, tons of killing all while listening to badass music composed by White Eyes, Noxtromo and Torturerr.
